name: Semantic Version Bumper

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      fixture:
        description: Fixture file under fixtures/ (e.g. commits-minor.txt)
        required: false
        default: commits-minor.txt

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  VERSION_FILE: VERSION
  CHANGELOG_FILE: CHANGELOG.md

jobs:
  test:
    name: Run Pester tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $r = Invoke-Pester -Path ./SemanticVersionBumper.Tests.ps1 -PassThru -Output Detailed
          if ($r.FailedCount -gt 0) { throw "Pester failures: $($r.FailedCount)" }

  bump:
    name: Run version bumper
    needs: test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Select fixture
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $fixture = '${{ github.event.inputs.fixture }}'
          if (-not $fixture) { $fixture = $env:FIXTURE_NAME }
          if (-not $fixture) { $fixture = 'commits-minor.txt' }
          "FIXTURE_PATH=fixtures/$fixture" | Out-File -FilePath $env:GITHUB_ENV -Append
          Write-Host "Using fixture: $fixture"
      - name: Bump version
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          if (-not (Test-Path $env:VERSION_FILE)) { '1.1.0' | Set-Content $env:VERSION_FILE }
          ./Invoke-Bumper.ps1 -VersionFile $env:VERSION_FILE -CommitsFile $env:FIXTURE_PATH -ChangelogFile $env:CHANGELOG_FILE

input.content:
name: Semantic Version Bumper

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  VERSION_FILE: VERSION
  CHANGELOG_FILE: CHANGELOG.md

jobs:
  test:
    name: Run Pester tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $r = Invoke-Pester -Path ./SemanticVersionBumper.Tests.ps1 -PassThru -Output Detailed
          if ($r.FailedCount -gt 0) { throw "Pester failures: $($r.FailedCount)" }

  bump:
    name: Bump (${{ matrix.fixture }})
    needs: test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        include:
          - fixture: commits-minor.txt
            expected: '1.2.0'
            bump: minor
          - fixture: commits-patch.txt
            expected: '1.1.1'
            bump: patch
          - fixture: commits-major.txt
            expected: '2.0.0'
            bump: major
          - fixture: commits-none.txt
            expected: '1.1.0'
            bump: none
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Bump version from fixture
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          FIXTURE: ${{ matrix.fixture }}
          EXPECTED: ${{ matrix.expected }}
          EXPECTED_BUMP: ${{ matrix.bump }}
        run: |
          $out = ./Invoke-Bumper.ps1 -VersionFile $env:VERSION_FILE `
            -CommitsFile "fixtures/$env:FIXTURE" `
            -ChangelogFile $env:CHANGELOG_FILE 2>&1 | Out-String
          Write-Host $out
          $newVersion = ($out -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match 'NEW_VERSION=' }) -replace '.*NEW_VERSION=', '' | ForEach-Object { $_.Trim() }
          $bumpType   = ($out -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match 'BUMP_TYPE=' })  -replace '.*BUMP_TYPE=',   '' | ForEach-Object { $_.Trim() }
          Write-Host "ASSERT_FIXTURE=$env:FIXTURE"
          Write-Host "ASSERT_NEW_VERSION=$newVersion"
          Write-Host "ASSERT_BUMP_TYPE=$bumpType"
          if ($newVersion -ne $env:EXPECTED) {
            throw "Expected NEW_VERSION=$env:EXPECTED but got '$newVersion'"
          }
          if ($bumpType -ne $env:EXPECTED_BUMP) {
            throw "Expected BUMP_TYPE=$env:EXPECTED_BUMP but got '$bumpType'"
          }
          Write-Host "RESULT_OK fixture=$env:FIXTURE new=$newVersion bump=$bumpType"

#!/usr/bin/env pwsh
# Harness: sets up a temp git repo with the project, runs `act push --rm` once
# (relying on the workflow's own matrix to cover all fixture cases), captures
# output to act-result.txt, and asserts on exact expected version values.
[CmdletBinding()]
param(
    [string] $OutputFile = (Join-Path $PSScriptRoot 'act-result.txt')
)
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$projectRoot = $PSScriptRoot

# Cases the workflow matrix runs. Used here for output assertions.

#!/usr/bin/env pwsh
# Thin CLI wrapper around SemanticVersionBumper.psm1.
[CmdletBinding()]
param(
    [Parameter(Mandatory)][string] $VersionFile,
    [Parameter(Mandatory)][string] $CommitsFile,
    [string] $ChangelogFile = 'CHANGELOG.md'
)
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
Import-Module (Join-Path $PSScriptRoot 'SemanticVersionBumper.psm1') -Force
$result = Invoke-VersionBump -VersionFile $VersionFile -CommitsFile $CommitsFile -ChangelogFile $ChangelogFile
Write-Host ("OLD_VERSION={0}" -f $result.OldVersion)
Write-Host ("NEW_VERSION={0}" -f $result.NewVersion)
Write-Host ("BUMP_TYPE={0}"   -f $result.BumpType)
